'''gajuru''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:placodontoid|placodontoid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-j-r
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:placodontoid|placodontoid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| gajuru
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæjirith|gæjirith]] || [[word:gæjirij|gæjirij]] || [[word:gæjirish|gæjirish]] || [[word:gæjiri|gæjiri]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:gajujuruth|gajujuruth]] || [[word:gajujuruj|gajujuruj]] || [[word:gajujurush|gajujurush]] || [[word:gajujuru|gajujuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:gajuruth|gajuruth]] || [[word:gajuruj|gajuruj]] || [[word:gajurush|gajurush]] || [[word:gajuru|gajuru]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:gajufruth|gajufruth]] || [[word:gajufruj|gajufruj]] || [[word:gajufrush|gajufrush]] || [[word:gajufruf|gajufruf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gajuruthu|gajuruthu]] || [[word:gajuruju|gajuruju]] || [[word:gajurushu|gajurushu]] || [[word:gajuruku|gajuruku]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gajuruth|gajuruth]] || [[word:gajuruj|gajuruj]] || [[word:gajurush|gajurush]] || [[word:gajuru|gajuru]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gajuruthul|gajuruthul]] || [[word:gajurujul|gajurujul]] || [[word:gajurushul|gajurushul]] || [[word:gajurukul|gajurukul]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gajuruthuthu|gajuruthuthu]] || [[word:gajurujuju|gajurujuju]] || [[word:gajurushushu|gajurushushu]] || [[word:gajuruku|gajuruku]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gajuruthun|gajuruthun]] || [[word:gajurujun|gajurujun]] || [[word:gajurushun|gajurushun]] || [[word:gajurukun|gajurukun]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gajuruthuoro|gajuruthuoro]] || [[word:gajurujuoro|gajurujuoro]] || [[word:gajurushuoro|gajurushuoro]] || [[word:gajurukuoro|gajurukuoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7296ca6}}
